## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD change
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Scope

- [ ] Command logic (`commands.py` / `command_modules/`)
- [ ] Data/storage (`data.py`, backups, JSON formats)
- [ ] Config/env handling (`config.py`, `.env` vars)
- [ ] Plotting/rendering
- [ ] XP/leaderboard
- [ ] Docs/README
- [ ] Workflow/automation

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `ruff check .` locally.
- [ ] I ran `python -m compileall .` locally.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets (`.env`, tokens, IDs beyond examples).
- [ ] I considered backward compatibility for stored JSON data.
- [ ] I verified slash-command behavior manually when relevant.

## Testing Notes

List manual/automated verification steps and outcomes.

## Environment Changes

- [ ] No environment variable changes.
- [ ] Added/changed env vars (document below and in README).

Env var notes:

## Risks / Rollback Plan

Describe known risks and how to safely revert if needed.

## Screenshots / Output (Optional)

Add screenshots, command outputs, or embeds when helpful.
